_comment: Auto-dismiss rules for XAE modal dialogs that would otherwise block te1000 MCP calls. The watcher (dialog-watch.ps1) tries each rule in order against any modal dialog it detects; the FIRST match wins and its button is clicked. A dialog that matches no rule is REPORTED (the MCP call fails with the dialog's title/text/buttons), never clicked. Keep 'rules' empty for report-only behavior.

_rule_format.match: REQUIRED regex tested (case-insensitive, -match) against the dialog TITLE
_rule_format.textMatch: OPTIONAL regex tested against the dialog BODY text; rule only fires if this also matches
_rule_format.button: EXACT button label to click (the '&' accelerator is ignored, case-insensitive). e.g. 'Yes', 'No', 'OK'

_safety: This runs against a LIVE cell. Only add dialogs you are certain are safe to auto-answer unattended. NEVER add rules for Activate Configuration / Run-mode / restart / download / safety prompts — those must stay human-confirmed. Prefer matching the non-destructive button (No/Cancel) when in doubt.
